name: six-layer-execution-system
description: Inspect, validate, recover, and evolve focus-first six-layer execution-system repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect and evolve focus-first execution-system workspaces
interface.longDescription: Use the Six-Layer Execution System plugin to inspect the local workspace snapshot, run canonical checker suites, recover current focus state, and modify protocol, governance, or closeout flows in repositories that follow the six-layer execution-system layout.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this six-layer execution-system repo, summarize the current focus state, then run the canonical checks
